calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353

Petitioners Hilda Newman and Marco Antonio Lopez were present in pro per as guardian ad litem for a minor Emmanuel Isai Lopez Newman, were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to Emmanuel Isai Lopez-Castellanos.
Decree Changing Name of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Off Calendar
